description: Goal: co-derive the first useful semantic facts from lowered bodies. Change: AnalyzeActivation, AnalyzeCallSite, ResolveDirectCall, DeriveReturnNeed, DeriveExecutable, PlanExecutable for direct calls and tuple destructure. Check: quicksort partition publishes tuple return type, TupleFields(2) return need, selected call edges, and executable facts before artifacts.
title: Compiler2 semantic: derive direct call, type, return-need, and executable facts
